zh.Woodbury, St. Thomas, Devon, England: 英國戴文伍德伯里 煙雨 艾可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Helen de Meriet於1327年出生在英國薩默塞特哈德時，她的父親George de Meriet27歲，母親Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton33歲。她於1342年與William d'Aumarle在英國戴文拉梅頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年2月8日在英國戴文享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Helen de Meriet于1327年出生在英国薩默塞特哈德时，她的父亲George de Meriet27岁，母亲Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton33岁。她于1342年与William d'Aumarle在英国戴文拉梅頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年2月8日在英国戴文享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meriet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: derivative of merle ‘blackbird’ (see Merle ). Compare Marlette .

History: Gédéon Merlet/Marlet from Roussy-le-Village in Moselle, France, married Margriet Martijn in Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1644, died in Piscataway, NJ, c. 1682. In 1662 they emigrated to the Dutch colony of New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY). Gédéon's name is listed (as Gidéon Merlet) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Marlette
meanings: Americanized form of French Marlet or of its variant Merlet . Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Malott , Malotte , Marlatt , Marlett , Mellott , and Melott .

History: Gédéon Merlet/Marlet from Roussy-le-Village in Moselle, France, married Margriet Martijn in Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1644, died in Piscataway, NJ, c. 1682. In 1662 they emigrated to the Dutch colony of New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY). Gédéon's name is listed (as Gidéon Merlet) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Merle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Etienne, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French, English (of Norman origin), German, and Dutch: nickname, possibly for a good or habitual singer or whistler, from Old French, Middle High German merle ‘blackbird’ (from Latin merula). See also Italian and Spanish Merlo .
French: habitational name from (Le) Merle, the name of several places in various parts of France.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Helen de Meriet was born in 1327, in Chard, Somerset, England, her father, George de Meriet, was 27 and her mother, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, was 33. She married William d'Aumarle in 1342, in Lamerton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 February 1363, in Devon, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Helen de Meriet est née en 1327, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, George de Meriet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William d'Aumarle en 1342, à Lamerton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 février 1363, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Helen de Meriet 1327 in Chard, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George de Meriet 27 und ihre Mutter Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton 33. Sie hat 1342 in Lamerton, Devon, England William d'Aumarle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Februar 1363 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Helen de Meriet è nata il nel 1327 nel Chard, Somerset, England, sua padre, George de Meriet, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William d'Aumarle nel 1342, nel Lamerton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1363, nel Devon, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Helen de Meriet(이)가 1327년 영국 서머세트 처드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George de Meriet(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1342년 영국 데폰 램르턴에서 William d'Aumarle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 2월 8일 영국 데폰에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Helen de Meriet nasceu em 1327, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, George de Meriet, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William d'Aumarle em 1342, em Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1363, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Helen de Meriet родилась в 1327 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени George de Meriet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William d'Aumarle в 1342 г. в местности лэмиртон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 февраля 1363 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Helen de Meriet nació en 1327, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, George de Meriet, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel Flory Fleury Kirketon Kirkton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William d'Aumarle en 1342, en Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1363, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
